text: The city council voted 6-2 on Tuesday to approve a new bike lane network covering twelve miles of downtown streets. Construction is expected to begin in March and finish before the start of the school year. Supporters say the project will reduce car traffic and improve safety near three elementary schools. Opponents raised concerns about the loss of on-street parking for local businesses.
reference_summary: The city council approved a 12-mile downtown bike lane network (6-2 vote), starting construction in March; supporters cite safety near schools, opponents cite lost parking.

text: Researchers at a university lab announced a new battery chemistry that retains 92% of its capacity after 2,000 charge cycles, roughly double the lifespan of comparable lithium-ion cells used in consumer electronics today. The team cautioned that manufacturing at scale has not yet been demonstrated and commercial availability is likely years away.
reference_summary: A new battery chemistry retains 92% capacity after 2,000 cycles, about double current lithium-ion lifespan, but scale manufacturing and commercial availability are still years off.

text: A small business owner in the coastal town reported a 40% increase in foot traffic after the town installed new pedestrian-only zones on weekends. Three other shop owners on the same street said sales were flat or down slightly, citing reduced parking access for customers driving in from outside town.
reference_summary: After weekend pedestrian zones, one shop owner saw 40% more foot traffic while three others reported flat or lower sales due to reduced parking for out-of-town customers.

text: The airline announced it will add two new direct routes starting next spring, connecting the regional airport to two major international hubs. The airline's CEO said the expansion reflects strong post-pandemic demand recovery, though industry analysts noted rising fuel costs could pressure margins on the new routes.
reference_summary: The airline will add two new direct international routes next spring, citing demand recovery, though analysts warn rising fuel costs could pressure margins.

text: A community garden program expanded to eight new plots this year after receiving a grant of $15,000 from a local foundation. Organizers say waitlists remain long, with over 60 families still hoping for a plot next season.
reference_summary: A community garden program added eight plots this year via a $15,000 grant, but over 60 families remain on the waitlist for next season.

text: The library system reported that digital audiobook checkouts rose 35% year over year, while physical book checkouts declined 8%. Staff attributed the shift to the popularity of the library's mobile app, launched eighteen months ago.
reference_summary: Digital audiobook checkouts rose 35% while physical checkouts fell 8%, a shift staff credit to the library's mobile app launched eighteen months ago.
